infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera is used to capture photos of civic issues for reporting.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is used to attach images to issue reports.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is used to pin the exact location of reported issues.
